meta_note: All methods are gRPC procedures exposed by PaymentService. API Gateway is the primary caller.

conventions.metadata_user_id: x-user-id: <userId> is required and extracted by RpcAuthGuard

rpc_errors.INVALID_ARGUMENT: Missing subscription/customer context or invalid business preconditions
rpc_errors.INTERNAL: Unexpected server error while calling Stripe or database operations

createCheckoutSession.description: Create a Stripe Checkout session for an authenticated user who does not already have an active Stripe subscription.

input.originUrl: string (required) — frontend origin used to build success/cancel URLs

throws.INVALID_ARGUMENT: Subscription record missing or user already has a Stripe subscription

createPortalSession.description: Create a Stripe Billing Portal session for users who already have an associated Stripe customer.

input.originUrl: string (required) — return URL after completing actions in Stripe portal

cancelSubscription.description: Cancel the authenticated user's Stripe subscription using the persisted stripeSubscriptionId.
